items.title: Fixtures & Mocks
items.description: Fixtures provide reusable test setup; mocks isolate the unit from external collaborators.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: Unit tests cover units in isolation; integration tests cover their interactions.

items.title: Test Coverage
items.description: Coverage tools (coverage.py / pytest-cov) reveal which lines/branches your unit tests exercise.

items.title: Property-Based Testing
items.description: Property tests are unit tests where pytest/hypothesis generates many random inputs to expose edge cases.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: Most teams require green unit tests in CI before a PR can be merged.
